General meeting may be called on not less than 14 clear days notice 24/07/2020

That the company be generally and unconditional authorised to make market purchases of the companies act 2006 of its ordinary shares of 15 5/7 pence each in the capital of the company provided that the maximum number of ordinary shares that may be purchased under this authority is 228,060,245 beiong just under 10% of the company issued share capital./ Notice period for general meetings other than an annual general meeting. 15/06/2016
